rationale: The cited paper appears only as a brief contextual reference when the authors note that long-term promotion effects on incidence, choice, and quantity have been studied elsewhere. The 2003 paper's core contribution is a contemporaneous elasticity-to-unit-sales decomposition, and its theory, derivations, empirical studies, and managerial implications do not build on or test the cited paper's framework directly. There is no distinct methodological borrowing, extension, or interpretive dependence tied to this specific citation.
